emails.subject: A "BIG" THANKS!
emails.body: A "BIG" THANKS! Just wanted to say THANKS to everybody for helping me when I went down with my kidney stone and afterwards while I was gone. Janet for calling for HELP, calling my wife and working Wednesday evening. Robert for going to the hospital with me. Scott for working Tuesday evening. Harry for working the rest of the week. Kathy for doing my suspense gas. Sherry and Joe for doing the Lamar GVA entries. And everybody for doing whatever you did that I don't know about. I appreciate the team effort and wanted everyone to know how grateful I am to work with such great people. Randy

emails.subject: Re: A "BIG" THANKS!
emails.body: Re: A "BIG" THANKS! What a nice note. I hope you are feeling better. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: A "BIG" THANKS!
emails.body: RE: A "BIG" THANKS! Yes, I am feeling a whole lot better. I still have one kidney stone in my right kidney that will be something special to look forward to. This time with the knowledge I acquired from this first experience, my Urologist and I have a PLAN of ACTION prepared. This should make the second episode less painful. Or least it sounds good. Randy To: Janzen, Randy
